name: MarketMan Restaurant Inventory API
what_it_does: MarketMan Restaurant Inventory Management REST API for restaurant food cost control, supplier ordering, and inventory management. Enables AI agents to manage food inventory counting and tracking for restaurant stock management automation, handle supplier ordering and purchase order management for restaurant procurement automation, access recipe costing and theoretical vs actual food cost for margin management, retrieve supplier price change alerts and invoice reconciliation for purchasing compliance, manage waste and spoilage tracking for food cost control, handle allergen and nutritional information management for menu compliance, access inventory analytics and variance reporting for food cost performance, retrieve integration with POS systems for sales-driven inventory depletion, manage multi-location inventory for restaurant group operations, and integrate MarketMan with restaurant accounting (QuickBooks, Xero), POS, and distribution platforms.
use_cases: Automating food inventory counts from restaurant operations agents
Managing supplier orders from procurement agents
Tracking food cost variance from margin management agents
Reconciling supplier invoices from AP agents
not_for: Non-restaurant food service without inventory management needs
Retail grocery without restaurant recipe costing focus
Single-item food businesses without multi-product inventory
best_when: A restaurant, bar, or food service operation using MarketMan wants AI agents to automate inventory counting, supplier ordering, food cost tracking, and purchase invoice reconciliation.
avoid_when: FOOD SAFETY TRACEABILITY RISK: MarketMan manages food inventory — automated inventory records must support FSMA Rule 204 food safety traceability for high-risk foods; inadequate traceability records create FDA compliance risk in food safety events. Allergen management liability — automated allergen and nutritional information must be accurate; incorrect allergen data in automated menu or order management creates food allergen liability and potential ADA accommodation failure. Price inflation risk — automated supplier ordering without price change validation can result in significant food cost overruns in volatile ingredient markets.

auth.notes: MarketMan uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. Documentation at marketman.com/integrations/api. Webhooks for inventory events. Tel Aviv, Israel HQ (headquarters). Founded 2012. Private (Gemini Israel Ventures, Entree Capital). 6,000+ restaurant customers globally. Restaurant inventory management focus. Competes with BlueCart, Restaurant365, and Compeat for restaurant inventory.

pricing.notes: Tel Aviv, Israel. Founded 2012. Gemini Israel/Entree-backed. 6,000+ restaurant customers. Restaurant inventory management. Competes with Restaurant365 for inventory focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API documentation

known_agent_gotchas: FSMA FOOD TRACEABILITY: Automated inventory records for high-risk foods must support FDA FSMA Rule 204 Key Data Elements (KDEs) including lot number, harvest date, and grower identity; automated inventory without traceability data creates FSMA compliance gap

Allergen accuracy liability — automated allergen data in recipe management must be verified and current; automated menu or order management with incorrect allergen information creates food allergy incident liability and potential ADA accommodation failure

Supplier price change volatility — automated purchase order generation without price change approval creates significant food cost overrun risk in volatile markets (e.g., avocados, beef, seafood); implement price change threshold alerts

POS depletion integration — automated inventory depletion from POS sales requires accurate POS-to-MarketMan ingredient mapping; unmapped menu items create inventory depletion inaccuracies that affect food cost calculations

Waste and yield variance — automated theoretical vs actual food cost comparison must account for yield percentages (cooking loss, trim waste); incorrect yield assumptions create systematic food cost reporting errors
Multi-currency international operations — MarketMan serves international restaurant groups; automated purchasing in non-USD currencies requires exchange rate handling for accurate food cost reporting
agent_readiness.security_notes: Restaurant inventory. SOC2. API key auth. US/EU. Restaurant inventory and purchasing data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Restaurant inventory. SOC2. API key. US/EU. Restaurant inventory and supplier data.
